qingkuai.description: Configuration options used by prettier-plugin-qingkuai when formatting `.qk` files.
qingkuai.markdownDescription: Configuration options used by **prettier-plugin-qingkuai** when formatting `.qk` files.

spaceAroundInterpolation.description: Controls whether spaces are inserted inside interpolation blocks.
spaceAroundInterpolation.markdownDescription:
Controls whether spaces are inserted **inside interpolation blocks** in QingKuai templates.

Interpolation blocks use **single curly braces**.

Example:

Without spaces:

```qingkuai
{count}
```

With spaces:

```qingkuai
{ count }
```

componentTagFormatPreference.description: Controls the preferred naming style for component tags in QingKuai templates.

componentAttributeFormatPreference.description: Controls the preferred naming style for component attributes in QingKuai templates.

oneOf.markdownDescription:
Prefer **camel case** component attributes.

Example:

```qingkuai
<MyComponent myCustomAttribute />
```

Prefer **kebab case** component attributes.

Example:

```qingkuai
<MyComponent my-custom-attribute />
```
